parsed_output.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Besant and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell convened an emergency meeting with major bank CEOs to address concerns that Anthropic's new AI model, Mythos, could enable advanced cyberattacks on financial institutions. Authorities urged banks to strengthen cybersecurity in response to the AI system's potential risks.
parsed_output.harm_type: Cybersecurity risk, potential for advanced cyberattacks

event.description: US officials convened emergency meeting with bank CEOs over concerns that Anthropic's AI model Mythos could enable advanced cyberattacks on financial institutions
